case_title: CHUN XIANG MA VS. OLGA WONG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-22-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CHUN XIANG MA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER DOROTHY WONG #300601. DEFENDANT OLGA WONG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER DOROTHY WONG #300601. AT THE TIME OF ROLL CALL, PARTIES INDICATED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AND IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE IN AUGUST, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2018 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JUL-10-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CHUNG XIANG MA IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER, CATHRYN HONG #191941. DEFENDANT OLGA WONG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER, CATHRYN HONG #191941. CURRENTLY THERE IS AN APPEAL WITH THE GOVERNMENT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM THAT NEEDS TO BE COMPLETED BEFORE THIS MATTER CAN PROCEED PER STIPULATION AGREEMENT OF ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $849.20 FILED BY MA, CHUN XIANG AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, OLGA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, CHUN XIANG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2018 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO APR-12-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CHUNG XIANG MA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OLGA WONG IS NOT PRESENT, BUT A PARTY APPEARED ON HER BEHALF INDICATING HE IS HER SON. COURT WAS NOT ABLE TO PROVIDE A CANTONESE INTERPRETER FOR THE HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED JAN-26-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, OLGA
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. PARTIES HAD REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT THE PRIOR HEARING AND IF THERE WERE NO APPEARANCES AT THIS HEARING, MATTER TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
